ai_summary: ORIENTAL TRIMEX LIMITED has appointed Mr. Gunasekaran A as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel, effective July 13, 2026, a standard leadership change disclosed as per SEBI regulations. Mr. Gunasekaran brings over 31 years of extensive experience in finance, taxation, and corporate compliance, which is expected to strengthen the company's financial management and regulatory adherence. The document presents no immediate red flags, indicating a routine personnel appointment.
